---
title: "Question Part 2 R code"
output: html_document
date: "2025-03-18"
---

## Part 2

```{r}
# Load necessary libraries
library(DBI)
library(RSQLite)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}
# Create and Connect to the Database
conn <- dbConnect(SQLite(), dbname = "flights_r.db")
```

```{r}
# Read CSV files
airports <- read_csv("airports.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
carriers <- read_csv("carriers.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
planes <- read_csv("plane-data.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

# Write tables to SQL Database
dbWriteTable(conn, "airports", airports, overwrite = TRUE)
dbWriteTable(conn, "carriers", carriers, overwrite = TRUE)
dbWriteTable(conn, "planes", planes, overwrite = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# Create the "ontime" table
dbExecute(conn, "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS ontime")
dbExecute(conn, "
    CREATE TABLE ontime (
        Year INTEGER,
        Month INTEGER,
        DayofMonth INTEGER,
        DayofWeek INTEGER,
        DepTime INTEGER,
        CRSDepTime INTEGER,
        ArrTime INTEGER,
        CRSArrTime INTEGER,
        UniqueCarrier TEXT,
        FlightNum INTEGER,
        TailNum TEXT,
        ActualElapsedTime INTEGER,
        CRSElapsedTime INTEGER,
        AirTime INTEGER,
        ArrDelay INTEGER,
        DepDelay INTEGER,
        Origin TEXT,
        Dest TEXT,
        Distance INTEGER,
        TaxiIn INTEGER,
        TaxiOut INTEGER,
        Cancelled INTEGER,
        CancellationCode TEXT,
        Diverted INTEGER,
        CarrierDelay INTEGER,
        WeatherDelay INTEGER,
        NASDelay INTEGER,
        SecurityDelay INTEGER,
        LateAircraftDelay INTEGER
    )
")
```

```{r}
#Load data from compressed CSV files
for (year in 2001:2005) {
    filename <- paste0(year, ".csv.bz2")
    cat("Processing:", filename, "\n")
    
    # Read CSV with appropriate options
    ontime <- suppressWarnings(read_csv(filename, locale = locale(encoding = "latin1"), show_col_types = FALSE))
    
    # Append to SQLite database
dbWriteTable(conn, "ontime", ontime, append = TRUE)
}

```

## Part 2(a) Best Times and Days to Minimize Delays

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=4}
# Query: Average delay by departure time (in minutes)
query_time <- "
    SELECT (CAST(DepTime / 100 AS INTEGER) + (DepTime % 100) / 60.0) AS DepHour,
           AVG(ArrDelay) AS AvgDelay
    FROM ontime
    WHERE ArrDelay IS NOT NULL AND DepTime IS NOT NULL AND DepTime >= 0 AND DepTime < 2400
    GROUP BY DepHour
    ORDER BY DepHour;
"

# Execute query
flights_time <- dbGetQuery(conn, query_time)

# Convert delay from minutes to hours
flights_time$AvgDelayHours <- flights_time$AvgDelay / 60

# Plot delay by departure time (in hours)
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(flights_time, aes(x = DepHour, y = AvgDelayHours)) +
    geom_line(color = "blue") +
    labs(title = "Average Arrival Delay by Departure Hour",
         x = "Hour of Departure",
         y = "Average Arrival Delay (hours)") +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 25, 1)) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 15)) +
    theme_minimal()+
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
    )


```

```{r}
# SQL Query: Average delay by day of the week
query_day <- "
  SELECT DayofWeek, AVG(ArrDelay) AS AvgDelay
  FROM ontime
  WHERE ArrDelay IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY DayofWeek
  ORDER BY DayofWeek;
"

# Run SQL command and load output into a dataframe
flights_day <- dbGetQuery(conn, query_day)

# Convert numeric day values to weekday names
day_mapping <- c("Monday", "Tuesday", "Wednesday", "Thursday", "Friday", "Saturday", "Sunday")
flights_day <- flights_day %>%
  mutate(DayofWeek = factor(DayofWeek, levels = 1:7, labels = day_mapping))

# Visualize average delay across weekdays
ggplot(flights_day, aes(x = DayofWeek, y = AvgDelay)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
  labs(title = "Average Arrival Delay by Day of the Week",
       x = "Day of the Week", 
       y = "Average Arrival Delay (minutes)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(AvgDelay, 1)), vjust = -0.5, size = 4)

```

## Part 2(b) Are Older Planes Have More Delays?

```{r}
library(broom)   # For extracting model coefficients
```

```{r}
# SQL Query: Relationship between aircraft age and delay
query <- "
SELECT f.Year AS Year,
       f.Year - p.year AS PlaneAge,
       AVG(f.ArrDelay) AS AvgDelay
FROM ontime f
JOIN planes p ON f.TailNum = p.tailnum
WHERE f.ArrDelay IS NOT NULL
  AND p.year IS NOT NULL
  AND f.Year BETWEEN 2001 AND 2005
GROUP BY f.Year, PlaneAge
ORDER BY f.Year, PlaneAge;
"

# Run SQL command and load output into a dataframe
df_yearly <- dbGetQuery(conn, query)

# Filter unreasonable data
df_filtered <- df_yearly %>%
  filter(PlaneAge >= 0, PlaneAge < 50)

# Plot: Faceted by Year
ggplot(df_filtered, aes(x = PlaneAge, y = AvgDelay)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "red") +
  facet_wrap(~Year, ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Aircraft Age vs Arrival Delay by Year",
    x = "Aircraft Age (Years)",
    y = "Average Arrival Delay (Minutes)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold")
  )

```

```{r}
# Compute slope for each year
slopes_df <- df_filtered %>%
  group_by(Year) %>%
  do({
    model <- lm(AvgDelay ~ PlaneAge, data = .)
    slope <- coef(model)["PlaneAge"]
    data.frame(Slope = slope)
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

# Plot: Slope (Beta) per year
ggplot(slopes_df, aes(x = Year, y = Slope)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray") +
  labs(
    title = "Yearly Regression Slopes: Aircraft Age vs Delay",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Slope (Beta)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )
```

## Part 2 (c) Logistic Regression for Diverted Flights

```{r}
library(DBI)
library(RSQLite)
library(dplyr)
library(caret)
library(pROC)
library(smotefamily)
library(glmnet)
library(Matrix)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
# Define features
numerical_features <- c(
  "Month", "DayofMonth", "DayofWeek", "DepTime", "CRSDepTime", 
  "ArrTime", "CRSArrTime", "Distance"
)
categorical_features <- c("UniqueCarrier")


# Result containers
coef_results <- list()
all_metrics <- data.frame()
plot_coef_df <- data.frame()

```

```{r}
# Count diverted = 0 and 1 per year
cat("Flight Diversion Counts by Year:\n")
for (year in years) {
  query <- paste0("SELECT Diverted FROM ontime WHERE Year = ", year)
  df <- dbGetQuery(conn, query)
  cat(sprintf("Year %d:\n", year))
  print(table(df$Diverted))
}
```

```{r}
# Loop over years
for (year in 2001:2005) {
  cat("\nProcessing Year:", year, "\n")
  
  query <- paste0(
    "SELECT Year, ", paste(c(numerical_features, categorical_features, "Diverted"), collapse = ", "),
    " FROM ontime WHERE Year = ", year, ";"
  )
  
  result <- dbSendQuery(conn, query)
  chunk_size <- 100000
  all_data <- data.frame()
  
  while (!dbHasCompleted(result)) {
    chunk <- dbFetch(result, n = chunk_size)
    all_data <- rbind(all_data, chunk)
  }
  dbClearResult(result)
  
  total_rows <- nrow(all_data)
  cat("Total Rows Processed:", total_rows, "\n")
  
  if (total_rows == 0 || !"Diverted" %in% colnames(all_data)) {
    warning(paste("Skipping year", year, "- no valid data"))
    next
  }
  
  # Preprocessing
  all_data$Diverted <- as.factor(all_data$Diverted)
  X <- all_data[, c(numerical_features, categorical_features), drop = FALSE]
  y <- all_data$Diverted
  
  X[numerical_features] <- lapply(X[numerical_features], function(x) ifelse(is.na(x), mean(x, na.rm = TRUE), x))
  X[numerical_features] <- lapply(X[numerical_features], scale)
  X[categorical_features] <- lapply(X[categorical_features], function(x) ifelse(is.na(x), "missing", x))
  
  X_matrix <- model.matrix(~ . - 1, data = X)
  X <- as.data.frame(X_matrix)
  all_feature_names <- colnames(X)
  
  set.seed(42)
  train_index <- createDataPartition(y, p = 0.8, list = FALSE)
  X_train <- X[train_index, ]
  y_train <- y[train_index]
  X_test <- X[-train_index, ]
  y_test <- y[-train_index]
  
  y_train_num <- as.numeric(as.character(y_train))
  smote_out <- SMOTE(X_train, y_train_num, K = 5, dup_size = 0)
  X_train_bal <- smote_out$data[, -ncol(smote_out$data)]
  y_train_bal <- smote_out$data[, ncol(smote_out$data)]
  
  lambda_val <- 1e-5
  model <- glmnet(as.matrix(X_train_bal), y_train_bal, family = "binomial", alpha = 0, lambda = lambda_val)
  
  coef_mat <- as.matrix(coef(model, s = lambda_val))
  coef_mat <- coef_mat[rownames(coef_mat) != "(Intercept)", , drop = FALSE]
  
  coef_vector <- rep(0, length(all_feature_names))
  names(coef_vector) <- all_feature_names
  intersecting_names <- intersect(rownames(coef_mat), all_feature_names)
  coef_vector[intersecting_names] <- coef_mat[intersecting_names, 1]

  coef_df <- data.frame(
    Feature = names(coef_vector),
    Coefficient = coef_vector,
    Year = as.factor(year)
  )

  coef_results[[as.character(year)]] <- coef_df
  plot_coef_df <- rbind(plot_coef_df, coef_df)

  y_pred_prob <- predict(model, newx = as.matrix(X_test), type = "response")
  y_pred <- ifelse(y_pred_prob > 0.5, 1, 0)
  y_actual <- as.numeric(as.character(y_test))

  acc <- mean(y_pred == y_actual)
  rec <- sum(y_pred == 1 & y_actual == 1) / sum(y_actual == 1)
  auc <- roc(y_actual, as.numeric(y_pred_prob))$auc

  all_metrics <- rbind(all_metrics, data.frame(Year = year, Accuracy = acc, Recall = rec, AUC = auc))
  cat(sprintf("Year %d | Accuracy: %.4f, Recall: %.4f, AUC: %.4f\n", year, acc, rec, auc))

  rm(all_data, X, y, X_train, y_train, X_test, y_test, smote_out,
     X_train_bal, y_train_bal, model, coef_df, coef_mat, coef_vector, y_pred, y_pred_prob, y_actual)
  gc()
}

dbDisconnect(conn)

cat("\nModel Performance Summary:\n")
print(all_metrics)
```

```{r}
# Generate full ordered feature list
all_feature_names <- unique(plot_coef_df$Feature)  # all features from model
ordered_features <- c(
  numerical_features,
  grep(paste0("^", categorical_features), all_feature_names, value = TRUE)
)

# Select first 9 features from defined order that appear in coef list
selected_9_features <- ordered_features[ordered_features %in% all_feature_names][1:9]

# Expand all year-feature combinations
plot_df_filtered <- merge(
  expand.grid(
    Feature = selected_9_features,
    Year = unique(plot_coef_df$Year)
  ),
  plot_coef_df,
  by = c("Feature", "Year"),
  all.x = TRUE
)

plot_df_filtered$Coefficient[is.na(plot_df_filtered$Coefficient)] <- 0
plot_df_filtered$Feature <- factor(plot_df_filtered$Feature, levels = selected_9_features)

# Plot
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(plot_df_filtered, aes(x = Feature, y = Coefficient, group = Year, color = Year)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = Year)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Coefficient by Feature (Lines = Year)",
    x = "Feature",
    y = "Coefficient Value"
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray")


```
